name: Gong chu nhat mong
reason: Duong canh thang giup khuon mat tron gon va ro net hon.

name: Gong tron kim loai
reason: Bo tron cac goc ham, tao cam giac mem hon cho tong the.

name: Gong oval ban vua
reason: Dang oval can bang tran, go ma va duong ham.

name: Gong cat-eye nhe
reason: Nhan nhe phan tren khuon mat, hop voi gu thoi trang hien dai.

name: Gong browline
reason: Tao diem nhan o chan may va tang do sac net khi nhin truc dien.

name: Gong khong vien
reason: Nhe mat, khong lam go ma hoac chieu dai mat bi nhan manh qua muc.
